name: @openlucaskaka/kagent
description: Codex-style LangGraph agent runtime for internal non-coding workflows.

scripts.check: npm run build:cli && node --test npm/lib/*.test.js && node --check npm/bin/kagent.js && node --check npm/bin/kagent-serve.js && node --check npm/lib/ink-runner.js && node --check npm/lib/python-runner.js
